scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @sentinel/web && apps/api/.venv/bin/ruff check apps/api && npm --prefix demo/vulnerable-taskflow run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @sentinel/web && apps/api/.venv/bin/mypy apps/api/src apps/api/tests && npm --prefix demo/vulnerable-taskflow run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @sentinel/web && apps/api/.venv/bin/pytest apps/api && npm --prefix demo/vulnerable-taskflow test
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sentinel/web && npm --prefix demo/vulnerable-taskflow run build
